name: personal-data-protection
description: Singapore PDPA, Indonesia UU PDP 27/2022, Thailand PDPA B.E. 2562 (2019), and Malaysia PDPA 2010 (with the 2024 Amendments — Act A1727) compliance reference for engineers — tech-agnostic, organised by where in the stack each obligation lands rather than by statute section number. Reference material only, not legal advice.
